caption: A screen recording of a virtual meeting shows a person wearing a headset and a dark shirt in a small video window in the upper right. The main area of the screen displays a complex digital mind map or network diagram on a black background, featuring various colorful circular icons connected by blue curved lines. Legible text labels associated with the icons include "Healthy Food," "Hidden Hunger," and "Invisible Hunger." Along the top of the browser window, multiple tabs are visible with titles such as "Truth & Learning by Systemantics," "Future of Society by Systemantics," and "Road Community Food Spot System." A small chat window on the right side of the interface displays the name "Janet Bedding." Across the sequence, the scene remains virtually static, with the person in the video window remaining still and the diagram unchanged, capturing a moment of a presentation or discussion.
